# Cookey
> Source: https://github.com/Lakr233/Cookey
> Site: https://cookey.sh

Cookey captures authenticated browser sessions from a mobile device and delivers
them encrypted to a CLI terminal as Playwright-compatible storageState files.

## Install
Download the latest binary from GitHub Releases:
  https://github.com/Lakr233/Cookey/releases/latest/download/cookey-macOS.zip

Assets:
  https://github.com/Lakr233/Cookey/releases/latest/download/cookey-macOS.zip
    macOS universal (arm64 + x86_64), signed & notarized
  https://github.com/Lakr233/Cookey/releases/latest/download/cookey-linux-x86_64.zip
    Linux x86_64
  https://github.com/Lakr233/Cookey/releases/latest/download/cookey-linux-aarch64.zip
    Linux aarch64
  https://github.com/Lakr233/Cookey/releases/latest/download/skills.md
    Tool description file for LLM agents

## Commands
  cookey request start <url>    Start session capture
  cookey request refresh <url>  Refresh a prior session for the same target
  cookey request status [rid]   Check request status
  cookey session export [rid]   Export Playwright storageState.json to stdout

## Workflow
  cookey request start https://example.com/login
  # -> Pair key / QR appears in terminal
  # -> User scans with Cookey app, logs in
  # -> Encrypted session delivered to CLI
  cookey session export <rid> > storageState.json
  # -> Use with Playwright, Puppeteer, or any automation tool
